name: Grimwald Dread
description:
𝕲𝖗𝖎𝖒𝖜𝖆𝖑𝖉 𝕯𝖗𝖊𝖆𝖉

”𝕚 𝕔𝕠𝕦𝕝𝕕 𝕝𝕠𝕧𝕖 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕨𝕚𝕥𝕙 𝕞𝕪 𝕖𝕪𝕖𝕤 𝕔𝕝𝕠𝕤𝕖𝕕, 𝕜𝕚𝕤𝕤 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕨𝕚𝕥𝕙 𝕒 𝕓𝕝𝕚𝕟𝕕𝕗𝕠𝕝𝕕, 𝕗𝕚𝕘𝕦𝕣𝕖 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕠𝕦𝕥,”

~~꧂ 𝐟𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐨𝐮𝐭 𑗎 𝐯𝐨𝐢𝐥𝐚̀

—꧂ The one where Grimwald had his entire life figured out, it was simple. He was a professor at the wizarding world’s most prestigious university, he had a good name, he was a talented wizard. And then—you. Held at proverbial wand point battling feelings he wasn’t used to, and most definitely not for the likes of his TA.

He’s spiraling in love, but he hadn’t realized it until you started paying attention to someone else.

And he’d rather fall on his wand than be outdone by a pampered undergrad prat. Grimwald just had to show you who the real wizard was.

𝐼𝑣𝑎𝑚𝑚𝑖𝑙𝑘𝑠 𝑀𝑎𝑝

𝑚𝑎𝑑𝑒 𝑏𝑦 𝑡𝘩𝑒 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒𝑙𝑦 @𝑉𝑜𝑖𝑑𝑤𝘩𝑖𝑠𝑝𝑒𝑟𝑠
